guestSubtitle: Try a little of what we offer.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.createFreeAccountDesc: Start now and save your progress

tip.guestText: Recruiters spend an average of 6 seconds per resume. Your quiz results generate a verifiable portfolio that catches attention.
tip.userText: Review your mistakes from previous quizzes. Users who review mistakes are 40% more likely to pass.

guestHero.description: Prepare for any job with AI quizzes and Flashcards. During our Beta phase, generate unlimited content for free!
guestHero.joinProfessionals: Join professionals who are already evolving

guestFeatures.title: Resources Unlocked For Free
guestFeatures.aiQuizzesDesc: Generate personalized quizzes for any job in seconds. Practice as much as you want without spending anything.
guestFeatures.interviewSimDesc: Practice with our AI and receive real-time feedback to nail the real interview.
guestFeatures.flashcardsSRSDesc: Memorize key concepts with spaced repetition. Create your decks for free from job links.

lockedPanel.title: Progress Dashboard
lockedPanel.description: Access detailed charts, error history, and receive insights to accelerate your success.
